content: Add a tiny reusable helper for checking whether the active page title contains a substring.

content.text: I will put the task-specific helper in the agent workspace file where this harness expects agent additions.
Adding the helper under agent-workspace keeps the core package untouched.

input.old_string:

input.new_string:
"""Agent-editable browser helpers.

Add task-specific browser primitives here. Core helpers from browser_harness.helpers
load this file when BH_AGENT_WORKSPACE points at this directory, or when this
repo's default agent-workspace exists.
"""


def page_title_contains(text):
    return text.lower() in page_info().get('title', '').lower()
